name: midos-self-improver
description: Structured learning pipeline with 6-layer quality scoring. Log errors, corrections, and patterns with automatic promotion to project memory.

competitors.author: pskoett
competitors.weakness: 2-tier promotion, no quality scoring, no dedup

competitors.author: halthelobster
competitors.weakness: Self-improvement is a side section, not the core

unique_features: Quality-gated promotion (blocks low-quality learnings from polluting memory)
Categorized logging (correction, knowledge_gap, best_practice, error, pattern)
Promotion requires evidence of recurrence, not just manual decision
Works with any agent (Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Copilot)
